programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A Richland County pursuit ends in a crash and the discovery of suspected stolen goods; in Nye County, officers confront excuses after finding keys believed to be stolen; in El Paso, a homemade cast leaves officers puzzled.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A man in Florida armed with a sword claims self-defense; in Warwick, officers deal with an unusual bar patron.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Franklin assist in a pursuit of a suspected robbery suspect; in Warwick, a driver suspected of DUI takes a sobriety test but faces an unexpected wardrobe issue; in Pasco, surveillance and a warrant lead to an arrest.
